series_metadata.series_description: Records documenting permission for the school/district to use student images recorded during official school activities/events, by staff or students in an official capacity (e.g., school newspaper, annual staff, etc.) Includes annual student identification/class pictures taken by school-contracted photographer. Student images include, but are not limited to, photos, video, and audio recordings.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain for 6 years after image/recording no longer being used, then destroy. ; Paper: Retain for 6 years after image/recording no longer being used, then destroy., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
